location.name: Choose
location.label: NB: States may be misleading if shielded. The shield simply intervenes by altering the acceleration once it has been chosen by an agent. For this reason, the car might be in the "PositiveAcc" state even though it is at that time reversing.

forall (i : int[0, fleetSize - 1]) velocity[i]' == acceleration[i] && forall (j : int[0, fleetSize - 2]) distance[j]' == velocity[j] - velocity[j + 1] && forall (j : int[0, fleetSize - 2]) D[j]' == (distance[j]+0.0 < 0.0 ? crashPenalty : distance[j]+0.0)

query.formula: strategy car1 = minE(D[0]) [<=105] {}->{velocity[1], velocity[0], distance[0]}: <> time >= 100
strategy car2 = minE(D[1]) [<=105] {}->{velocity[2], velocity[1], distance[1]}: <> time >= 100
Pr[<=100;1000](<> forall (i : int[0, fleetSize - 2]) (distance[i] < 0)) under car1
Pr[<=100;1000](<> forall (i : int[0, fleetSize - 2]) (distance[i] < 0)) under car2
